title: Automate Validation Test Case
description: Schema for Automate stack validation test cases

test_id.description: Unique test identifier. Format: <SUBCOMPONENT_PREFIX>-<NNN> (e.g., SW-001, MECH-001, HFPGA-001, MAMC-001)

title.description: Short descriptive title of the test case

description.description: Detailed description of what the test validates

dependencies.description: List of test IDs or external prerequisites that must be satisfied before running this test

action.description: What action to perform in this step

expected_result.description: What the expected outcome of this step is

test_steps.description: Ordered list of steps to execute the test

success_criteria.description: Criteria that must be met for the test to pass

failure_criteria.description: Conditions that indicate the test has failed

executed.description: Whether the test has been executed

result.description: Result of the test execution. null if not yet executed

execution_date.description: Date the test was last executed (YYYY-MM-DD)

executed_by.description: Name of the person who executed the test

notes.description: Additional notes or observations from test execution
